features.human_description: Top activations come from the same LIBERO Spatial tasks as F35, but with more temporally distributed activation corresponding to the bowl grasp phase rather than placement. In episodes where both features are present, F1279 activates at higher magnitude; in episodes where F1279 is absent, F35 adopts a more distributed activation pattern. Encodes bowl grasp in LIBERO Spatial. Functionally complementary to F35 (placement).
